basic_details.job_title: East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (OP) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: East Coast Railway has published the Junior Engineer (OP) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Engineer (OP) position. Candidates with a maximum age of 47 years and holding a Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass, or 10+2 in Science Stream are eligible to apply offline at https://rrcbbs.org.in. The application process will be active until 10 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering or ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass or 10+2 in Science Stream.
qualification.details: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering branch including their sub stream branches, if any Qualification of ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass 10+2 in Science Stream Should have working as Technician in Electrical (OP) Department/KUR Division and have completed 03 years of continuous Railway service in skilled grade as on the date of notification.

selection_process: Written examination on CBT/TBT Mode Scrutiny of Service Record
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (OP) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rrcbbs.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (OP) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Engineer (OP) post in East Coast Railway is 10-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Engineer (OP) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass, or 10+2 in Science Stream to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Engineer (OP) position is 47 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Engineer (OP) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Engineer (OP) post in East Coast Railway.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Engineer (OP) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be placed at Level-06 in the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type is Deputation.

faq.question: Q8. Which division of East Coast Railway is recruiting?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the KUR Division of East Coast Railway.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is DRM(P)/KUR/Elect/JE/25% (IAQ)/2026.

faq.question: Q10. What are the selection methods for the Junior Engineer (OP) post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination (CBT/TBT Mode) and Scrutiny of Service Record and APARs.
